project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Payment Information (amount, currency, country code, language, payment token, payment network, donor name components, donor email, donor postal address, email opt-in, transaction fee preference, metrics ID, app version, app install ID)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: User submits a donation via Apple Pay or web payment. Payment data is sent to the Wikimedia donation processing service.

flow_steps.code: class DonateCoordinator: Coordinator { enum Source { case articleCampaignModal; case settingsProfile; case exploreProfile; case articleProfile; case yearInReview; case placesProfile; case savedProfile; case searchProfile; case activityTabProfile } }
flow_steps.details: User initiates a donation from various entry points: article campaign modal, settings, explore, article, year in review, places, saved articles, search, or activity tab.

flow_steps.code: PKPaymentRequest configured with amount, currency code, country code, and merchant identifier for Apple Pay
flow_steps.details: Donation parameters (amount, currency, country) are used to configure an Apple Pay payment request or a web payment form.

flow_steps.code: Apple Pay system handles the user's payment authorization via Touch ID/Face ID
flow_steps.details: For Apple Pay donations, the system handles biometric authentication and payment authorization. The app receives a payment token, not raw card details.

flow_steps.code: public func submitPayment(amount: Decimal, countryCode: String, currencyCode: String, languageCode: String, paymentToken: String, paymentNetwork: String?, donorNameComponents: PersonNameComponents, recurring: Bool, donorEmail: String, donorAddressComponents: CNPostalAddress, emailOptIn: Bool?, transactionFee: Bool, metricsID: String?, appVersion: String?, appInstallID: String?, completion: @escaping (Result<Void, Error>) -> Void)
flow_steps.details: Payment data (token, amount, currency, donor info, email opt-in) is submitted to the Wikimedia donation API endpoint via HTTPS POST for payment processing.

flow_steps.code: DonateFunnel logs various donation events: donate_click, applepay_click, submission_error, success_toast, etc.
flow_steps.details: Donation funnel events (impression, click, submission, success, error) are logged via EventPlatformClient for analytics.

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Donation Configuration (payment methods, suggested amounts, currency, merchant ID, country-specific settings)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: App fetches donation configuration from the server for the user's country to configure payment options.

flow_steps.code: @objc public func fetchConfigsForCountryCode(_ countryCode: String, completion: @escaping (Error?) -> Void)
flow_steps.details: The app fetches donation configuration (payment methods, amounts, currency) from the Wikimedia donation service based on the user's country code from locale settings.

flow_steps.code: public func fetchConfigs(for countryCode: String, completion: @escaping (Result<Void, Error>) -> Void)
flow_steps.details: Donation config response is parsed to determine available payment methods (Apple Pay, web) and suggested donation amounts.
